slides.headline: Manage Remote VASCO Teams
slides.body: Empower your VA School Certifying Officials (VASCOs) to lead remote and hybrid teams with ease.

slides.headline: Check COE Remaining Entitlement
slides.body: Ensure your VASCO team is up-to-date on each student veteran's Certificate of Eligibility (COE) status.
bullets: Log COE updates in the team file

slides.headline: Communicate SAA Decisions
slides.body: Inform the State Approving Agency (SAA) of all changes and decisions regarding student veterans' enrollment.

slides.headline: Track Compliance
slides.body: Stay on top of all compliance requirements for student veterans under Chapter 33.

slides.headline: Support Student Veterans
slides.body: Offer guidance and support to student veterans through the Yellow Ribbon Program.

slides.headline: Monitor and Report
slides.body: Regularly monitor and report on the progress of student veterans' education benefits.
Learn more about VASCO Assistant Pro, the tool that helps VASCOs manage remote teams. Link in bio.
slides.headline: Read the full post

outline.caption: Empower your VA School Certifying Officials (VASCOs) with tools to manage remote and hybrid teams effectively. Steps include checking COE status, communicating with the SAA, and monitoring student veteran progress. Learn more with VASCO Assistant Pro.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 3, 'Track Compliance,' as it could benefit from a more concise headline to better summarize the key takeaway.
